description: Style NoteFall head over heels in love with this chic and stylish backpack from baggit. Its timeless design is set to see you through many seasons to come. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can pair this bag with western as well as ethnic ensembles.Product DetailsBrown velvet finish backpack with branding and a flap on the front with magnetic closureTwo mesh padded adjustable shoulder straps and a short haul loopZippered main compartment with internal compartmentOne zippered compartment under the flap at front, a padded compartment which opens with a zip from the left side big enough to store a 15&rdquo laptop, one small zippered compartment in front and one open compartment on the right side with drawstringMaterial and CareFabric, syntheticWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 41 cmWidth: 29cmDepth: 6 cm
